findings.summary: Legacy .sch parser misses U1 (SST39LF010 flash) data pin net connections

incorrect.description: Same as EEPROM: all MEMDATA_0-7 nets only show J1, missing U1 I/O pin connections. This is a consistent bug across all MM1 boards with the legacy KiCad 5 schematic format.

findings.summary: Drill classification correctly identifies via holes vs component holes for FLASH board

correct.description: FLASH: 16 vias at 0.2mm correctly classified; 32 component holes at 0.8mm (PLCC socket pins) and 2 holes at 1.0mm (pin header) correctly classified as component_holes. Total 50 holes matches PTH drill file count.
